title: hieracium rhomboides
intro: Hieracium rhomboides, also known as Rhombic Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be utilized to treat wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Hieracium rhomboides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Hieracium rhomboides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in salves and creams to aid in wound healing and skin care.
